description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a clean, rectangular design. The exterior is primarily composed of red brick with large, square windows that provide ample natural light. The property features a driveway with two parked cars, a small front lawn, and a paved walkway leading to the main entrance. In the backyard, there is a landscaped garden area with palm trees, a small pool, and flowering bushes, adding a touch of greenery and leisure space. The house has a prominent main entryway with a covered porch and a garage integrated into the structure. The overall layout is open and spacious, with a focus on geometric lines and functional outdoor spaces.
description: A modern, two-story red brick house with large windows, a flat roof, driveway, garage, and landscaped backyard featuring a pool and garden.
description_view_0: Front and left side of the house with driveway, two cars, main entrance, and a view of the backyard pool and garden.
description_view_1: Rear view showing the backyard with flowering bushes, palm trees, and the pool, as well as the back facade of the house.
description_view_2: Right side and rear of the house, highlighting the backyard landscaping and the side windows.
description_view_3: Front right perspective showing the driveway, garage, main entrance, and a partial view of the backyard greenery.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Covered porch with a single main door, steps leading up, and integrated garage entrance
